ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Anh,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on dynamicnailsupply.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Anh,

I hope you're doing well!

This is Priyanka from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App by PluginHive. Thank you for choosing our solution!

To make your setup experience smoother, we offer free onboarding Zoom calls where we walk you through the configuration process and tailor the app to your shipping needs. You can use the link below to book a session at your convenience:

👉 [Schedule an appointment]

We'd also like to remind you that we have a 14-day free trial period during which you can test the plugin thoroughly and see how it suits your needs and justifies itself.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to helping you get started!

Warm regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Anh,
 
I hope you're doing well!
 
This is Priyanka from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App by PluginHive. Thank you for choosing our solution!
 
To make your setup experience smoother, we offer free onboarding Zoom calls where we walk you through the configuration process and tailor the app to your shipping needs. You can use the link below to book a session at your convenience:
 
👉 [Schedule an appointment]
 
We'd also like to remind you that we have a 14-day free trial period during which you can test the plugin thoroughly and see how it suits your needs and justifies itself.
 
Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to helping you get started!
 
Warm regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

US store
UPS carrier added and tested for labels
7079 order
